title: Smokey and the Good Time Outlaws
original_title: Smokey and the Good Time Outlaws
overview: Two guys come to Nashville and try to make it on the country music scene. Their vision is to play at the Grand IL' Opry. Rejection after rejection pushes them to the verge of quitting and moving back to wherever they came from.
